🎬 MOVIE API ENDPOINTS (Marvel + DC)


make server.js and run below path

const express = require("express");
const app = express();

// import your npm-style API
const marvelAPI = require("./index");

// optional: global middleware
app.use(express.json());

// ✅ Clean base route
app.use("/api/movies", marvelAPI());

// ✅ Root route (nice touch for production)
app.get("/", (req, res) => {
    res.send("🎬 Movie API is running...");
});

// ❌ Handle unknown routes (important)
app.use((req, res) => {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "Route Not Found" });
});

// 🚀 Start server
const PORT = 5665;

app.listen(PORT, () => {
    console.log(`Server running on http://localhost:${PORT}`);
});

Run with Base URL:
http://localhost:5665/api/movies

========================
📌 GET APIs
===========

1. Get all movies
   GET /api/movies

Example:
http://localhost:5665/api/movies

2. Filter by universe
   GET /api/movies?universe=Marvel
   GET /api/movies?universe=DC

Example:
http://localhost:5665/api/movies?universe=Marvel

3. Filter by year
   GET /api/movies?year=2022

Example:
http://localhost:5665/api/movies?year=2022

4. Filter by phase (Marvel only)
   GET /api/movies?phase=3

Example:
http://localhost:5665/api/movies?phase=3

5. Search by title
   GET /api/movies?search=batman

Example:
http://localhost:5665/api/movies?search=batman

6. Pagination
   GET /api/movies?page=1&limit=5

Example:
http://localhost:5665/api/movies?page=1&limit=5

7. Sorting
   GET /api/movies?sort=year
   GET /api/movies?sort=title

Example:
http://localhost:5665/api/movies?sort=year

8. Get movie by ID
   GET /api/movies/:id

Example:
http://localhost:5665/api/movies/1

========================
📌 POST API
===========

9. Add new movie
   POST /api/movies

Body (JSON):
{
"title": "New Movie",
"universe": "Marvel",
"year": 2025,
"phase": 5
}

========================
📌 PUT API
==========

10. Update movie
    PUT /api/movies/:id

Example:
http://localhost:5665/api/movies/1

Body (JSON):
{
"title": "Updated Movie Name"
}

========================
📌 DELETE API
=============

11. Delete movie
    DELETE /api/movies/:id

Example:
http://localhost:5665/api/movies/1

========================
📌 STATUS CODES
===============

200 → Success
201 → Created
400 → Bad Request
404 → Not Found
500 → Server Error

========================
📌 NOTES
========

* Use Postman or browser for testing GET APIs
* Use JSON body for POST and PUT
* ID must be numeric
* Query params can be combined:

Example:
http://localhost:5665/api/movies?universe=Marvel&sort=year&page=1&limit=5



-By Prof.Priyen Patel
